source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/04_2G & 3G (A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW)/▶ CE MDR/230926 기술문서 & 임상평가 보완 리뷰 2 (with 컨설팅)/CE MDR TD 보완_230926/A-TCF-5-157 Clinical Evaluation (rev.1).docx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Contents list for clinical evaluation documentation, including plans, reports, PMCF documents, literature study, checklist, declarations, clinical study, and participant CV.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Identifies clinical evaluation file components and their document numbers, revision numbers, and revision dates where provided.
keyPoints: Clinical Evaluation Plan is listed as Document No. A-TCF-5-117, Revision No. 1.
Clinical Evaluation Report is listed as Document No. A-TCF-5-118, Revision No. 1.
Post Market Clinical Follow-up Plan is listed as Document No. A-PMCFP-5-001, Revision No. 1.
Post Market Clinical Follow-up Evaluation Report is listed as Document No. A-PMCFEP-5-001, Revision No. 0, with revision date stated as two years after it is on the market.
Declaration of Interest, Clinical Study, and CV of participant are listed as appendices with Revision No. 0 and Revision Date 22 December 2022.
